zh.Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena Comyn於1242年之後出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland8782歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy8779歲。她和William Brechin至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯布雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena Comyn于1242年之后出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland8782岁，母亲Elizabeth de Quincy8779岁。她和William Brechin至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena Comyn was born after 1242, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 8782 and her mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 8779. She had at least 1 son with William Brechin. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena Comyn est née après 1242, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 8782 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 8779 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William Brechin. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena Comyn nach 1242 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland 8782 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Quincy 8779. Sie hatte mit William Brechin mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Comyn è nata il dopo il 1242 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, aveva 8782 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Quincy, aveva 8779 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William Brechin. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena Comynが1242年以後にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotlandは8782歳，母Elizabeth de Quincyは8779歳であった。彼女はWilliam Brechinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena Comyn(이)가 1242년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 8782세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 8779세였다. 그녀는 William Brechin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Brechin, Forfarshire, Scotland: Brechin, Aonghas, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena Comyn nasceu após 1242, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tinha 8782 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Quincy, tinha 8779 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William Brechin. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena Comyn родилась после 1242 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 8782 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 8779. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Brechin. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena Comyn nació después de 1242, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tenía 8782 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Quincy, tenía 8779 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William Brechin. Murió en su pueblo.
